issues.title: Enemy deals 40 damage (57% of 69 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: During enemy turn (seq 465), the player took 40 damage, which is 58.0% of their 69 HP at the time. Floor 6, encounter 2, turn 18.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.title: Enemy deals 35 damage (81% of 43 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: During enemy turn (seq 469), the player took 35 damage, which is 81.4% of their 43 HP at the time. Floor 6, encounter 2, turn 19.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.title: Enemy deals 46 damage (100% of 46 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: During enemy turn (seq 473), the player took 46 damage, which is 100.0% of their 46 HP at the time. Floor 6, encounter 2, turn 20.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.title: HP crashes from 100 to 8 in single encounter on floor 6
issues.description: During encounter 2 on floor 6, player HP went from a high of 100 to 8, an unfun swing of 92 HP in one encounter.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage mitigation or split boss damage over more turns

issues.title: 4 consecutive encounters with >90% HP remaining (floors 2-3)
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP ([98, 96, 93, 99]) across 4 consecutive encounters (F2E0, F2E1, F2E2, F3E0). The game may lack challenge in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid encounters to maintain tension

issues.title: 3 consecutive encounters with >90% HP remaining (floors 5-6)
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP ([96, 92, 100]) across 3 consecutive encounters (F5E2, F6E0, F6E1). The game may lack challenge in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid encounters to maintain tension

issues.title: F3E1 takes 9 turns (prev floor avg: 3.7, 2.5x)
issues.description: Encounter 1 on floor 3 against crystal_golem (common) took 9 turns to resolve, which is 2.5x the average of 3.7 turns from floor 2. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 2 and floor 3; reduce crystal_golem HP or damage

issues.title: F3E2 takes 8 turns (prev floor avg: 3.7, 2.2x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 against magma_core (boss) took 8 turns to resolve, which is 2.2x the average of 3.7 turns from floor 2. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 2 and floor 3; reduce magma_core HP or damage

issues.title: F6E2 takes 20 turns (prev floor avg: 6.3, 3.2x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 against the_curator (boss) took 20 turns to resolve, which is 3.2x the average of 6.3 turns from floor 5. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 5 and floor 6; reduce the_curator HP or damage
